mapper.select: SELECT url FROM app_send_url WHERE send_id = #{id} and `type` = 2
SELECT url FROM app_send_url as a LEFT JOIN app_send_out_sheet as b on b.id = a.send_id WHERE a.type = 1 AND a.`index` = 1 AND b.id = #{id} AND a.source = 2
SELECT url,`index` type FROM app_send_url WHERE type = 2 and source = 2 AND send_id = #{id}
SELECT user_b_id FROM app_merchants_brand WHERE brand_id = #{brandId}
